case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. KATE A. MERRIGAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GOLNAZ HEIDARI ESQ RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100043466) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FOR NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 100047282) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 100041067) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
PROOF OF SERVICE [OF DECLARATION RE OSC] (TRANSACTION ID # 100043466) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035928) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MERRIGAN, KATE A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRIGAN, KATE A. $3,542.06 PRINCIPAL, $690.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,457.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 100047282) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-23-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
